message:
� Fix /ci-cd error spike: throttle repeated ksc_error emissions (#10092) (#10118)

Root causes identified and fixed:

1. Missing .catch() on res.json() in useGitHubPipelines fetchView() and
   fetchPipelineLog() — non-JSON responses (HTML error pages) caused
   unhandled SyntaxError rejections that escaped the global error filter.

2. Unsafe property access: wf.cells in WorkflowMatrix and non-null
   assertion on pullRequests in PipelineFlow caused card_render errors
   when API returned unexpected shapes.

3. No per-card error throttling — polling cards re-emitted the same
   error every 30-120s. Added 60s per-card+category throttle window
   and a 50-error per-page session budget to cap amplification.

4. Broadened JSON parse error filter to also match SyntaxError by name
   and 'Unexpected end of JSON' — covers browser variants that slipped
   through the existing substring checks.

Expected impact: >50% reduction in /ci-cd ksc_error events.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
